case_title: LAURANT, TOINETTE B,A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM et al vs. BULLER, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAURANT, TOINETTE B,A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM LAURANT, ALEXANDER W, AS GUARDIAN FOR MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT BULLER, EDWARD DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-11-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-24-2001
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-2001 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON DEC-11-2001, FTA, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY SATTLER STEVEN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2001 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2002, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY STEVEN E SATTLER. HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2002, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-20-2002, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY STEVEN E SATTLER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-07-2002 CONTINUED FROM FEB-20-2002 TO APR-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-24-2002, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-24-2002, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM AND ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTORNEY STEVEN SATTLER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-09-2002 CONTINUED FROM APR-24-2002 TO JUN-26-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2002, OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED.
